title: artemisia selengensis var. shansiensis
intro: Artemisia selengensis var. shansiensis, also known as Chinese wormwood, is a variant of the Artemisia selengensis plant, a member of the sunflower family native to northern China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce fever and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Chinese wormwood include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections, as well as its potential to act as a natural antimalarial agent. Chinese wormwood can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
